rows.label: qev018401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Say, you? Don't you think this Kirsty is a
truly wonderful woman?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Despite being an Operations Manager, she possesses a
deep understanding of Frontier Net.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0003
rows.name:
She also showed understanding towards my
Battle Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Believe it or not, she's going to introduce me to
a certain corporation soon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018401_SEL0011
rows.name: Agree that Kirsty is wonderful.

rows.label: qev018401_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev018401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you sense an ulterior motive
behind Kirsty's kindness.

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0005
rows.name:
I'm glad we share the same opinion.
She is someone who can discern the real deal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0006
rows.name:
It seems there are many among the Pathfinders
who adore her as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0007
rows.name:
I understand your feelings. Until recently, I was a mass
of suspicion myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I was convinced that due to someone's conspiracy, my
Battle Data Probes weren't being handled by corporations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0009
rows.name:
...I hope you are saved someday too. By a kind person
like Kirsty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now then, shall we go to the usual corner? I'm sure you
too are desiring the revival of further Battle Data Probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0011
rows.name: Next, I'll make a Resist Down Probe for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0012
rows.name:
About 30000gm of Miranium should be enough.
How about it? You'll do it, won't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0013
rows.name:
You're the same as her.
You know what is truly excellent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0014
rows.name:
If you bring it, I will use all of my knowledge to
make the Battle Data Probe for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0015
rows.name: Say, you? Being needed by someone is a good feeling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Until a short while ago, I was making Battle Data Probes
with the feeling of wanting to show everyone up...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0017
rows.name:
But now, I can face the work with a gentle feeling of
purely wanting to help everyone, to save them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Come on, bring me the Miranium.
I'll make the Resist Down Probe right away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Hmmm... A problem with the third blueprint...
What should I do...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0020
rows.name: ...Oh, it's you. How is it? Did you gather the Miranium?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_JNK0030
rows.name: Hand over

rows.label: qev018401_SEL0031
rows.name: Hand over 30000gm of Miranium.

rows.label: qev018401_JNK0040
rows.name: Do not hand over

rows.label: qev018401_SEL0041
rows.name: Do not hand it over for now.

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hmmm, high-quality Miranium...
Now, if I can just solve the problem on this end, it'll
be complete...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0022
rows.name: ...Please wait a moment. I'll go get advice from Kirsty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Since she's an excellent Frontier Net specialist, she might
have an idea to solve this difficult problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0024
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—It's complete! I have finally accomplished it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0025
rows.name: This is the Resist Down Probe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0026
rows.name:
If you install this at a Frontier Net Spot, you can
lower all resistance values of enemies in the
surrounding area![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0027
rows.name: Come on, take it! Use this to protect NLA![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Come to think of it, I was able to have corporate
executives look at my Data Probe once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0029
rows.name:
This is all thanks to Kirsty putting in a good word for me.
I won't let this chance... go to waste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0030
rows.name:
I'll firmly grasp it and accomplish even greater research
than now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0031
rows.name: I see... Then, while you are looking for Miranium...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018401_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'll flush out the problems in the design.
Hmmm... What should I do...[ST:wait ]
